headline: Academic Integrity Violations at Universities Surge 85% Since 2022
context: Public university disciplinary data shows academic dishonesty cases nearly doubled in three years.

cards.big: Academic integrity violations at public universities rose 85% from 2022 to 2025
cards.sub: Plagiarism contract cheating and exam fraud account for bulk of cases

cards.big: Online contract cheating services targeting Malaysian students grew to 340 websites
cards.sub: Average cost for a ghostwritten assignment is RM200 to RM500 in 2025

cards.big: Only 7 of 20 public universities use plagiarism detection software systematically
cards.sub: Inconsistent enforcement creates uneven standards across institutions

cards.big: Australia criminalized contract cheating services in 2020 under its TEQSA Act
cards.sub: Legal penalties target suppliers rather than students to address root causes

cards.big: Widespread cheating reflects assessment design failure not just student moral failure
Should Malaysia criminalize commercial contract cheating services targeting students
